requirement_topic.en: Kuwaiti Authorized Importer / Local Distributor Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 科威特授权进口商/本地经销商要求
requirement_topic.zht: 科威特授權進口商/本地經銷商要求

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers selling wireless and telecom devices in Kuwait must appoint a local authorized distributor or importer. Under the Kuwait Commercial Companies Law and Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) regulations, commercial agency and distribution agreements with foreign companies must be registered. The local entity must be a Kuwaiti company or a 51% Kuwaiti-owned entity. The CITRA type approval application and customs clearance documentation typically require the name of the licensed local importer or distributor. The CITRA approval certificate issued to the local importer confirms their responsibility for the product in the Kuwait market.
summary.zh: 在科威特销售无线和电信设备的外国制造商须指定本地授权经销商或进口商。根据科威特《商业公司法》和商业和工业部（MOCI）法规，与外国公司的商业代理和分销协议须进行注册。本地实体须为科威特公司或51%科威特持股的实体。CITRA型号认证申请和海关清关文件通常需注明持牌本地进口商或经销商名称。颁发给本地进口商的CITRA批准证书确认其对科威特市场产品的责任。
summary.zht: 在科威特銷售無線和電信設備的外國製造商須指定本地授權經銷商或進口商。根據科威特《商業公司法》和商業和工業部（MOCI）法規，與外國公司的商業代理和分銷協議須進行登記。本地實體須為科威特公司或51%科威特持股的實體。CITRA型號認證申請和海關清關文件通常需注明持牌本地進口商或經銷商名稱。頒發給本地進口商的CITRA批准證書確認其對科威特市場產品的責任。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Commercial Companies Law No. 1 of 2016 (and amendments)
Kuwait Commercial Agencies Law No. 36 of 1964 (and amendments)
Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) — commercial agency registration requirements
CITRA Type Approval Procedures — local importer / distributor requirements

summary.en: In China, foreign manufacturers can sell directly or through wholly foreign-owned enterprises (WFOEs), joint ventures, or appointed distributors. There is no blanket requirement for a Chinese-majority-owned distributor for most product categories, though specific regulated sectors (telecoms, etc.) may have ownership restrictions. MIIT NAL and SRRC type approval can be held by the manufacturer or its Chinese representative.
summary.zh: 在中国，外国制造商可直接销售或通过外商独资企业（WFOE）、合资企业或指定经销商进行销售。对于大多数产品类别，不存在强制要求中国多数持股经销商的规定，尽管特定受监管行业（电信等）可能存在所有权限制。工信部NAL和SRRC型号认证可由制造商或其中国代表持有。
summary.zht: 在中國，外國製造商可直接銷售或透過外商獨資企業（WFOE）、合資企業或指定經銷商進行銷售。對於大多數產品類別，不存在強制要求中國多數持股經銷商的規定，儘管特定受監管行業（電信等）可能存在所有權限制。工信部NAL和SRRC型號認證可由製造商或其中國代表持有。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — representative or manufacturer applicant
MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — applicant requirements

gap.en: Kuwait requires a locally registered importer or distributor that is a Kuwaiti company or 51% Kuwaiti-owned entity. Chinese manufacturers cannot import directly without a registered local partner. The commercial agency agreement must be registered with MOCI. The local importer is named on the CITRA type approval certificate and bears responsibility for product compliance in Kuwait. This is a structural market-entry requirement with no direct China equivalent.
gap.zh: 科威特要求本地注册进口商或经销商须为科威特公司或51%科威特持股实体。中国制造商不能在没有注册本地合作伙伴的情况下直接进口。商业代理协议须向MOCI进行注册。本地进口商在CITRA型号认证证书上署名，并对科威特境内的产品合规承担责任。这是市场准入的结构性要求，在中国没有直接对应项。
gap.zht: 科威特要求本地登記進口商或經銷商須為科威特公司或51%科威特持股實體。中國製造商不能在沒有登記本地合作夥伴的情況下直接進口。商業代理協議須向MOCI進行登記。本地進口商在CITRA型號認證證書上署名，並對科威特境內的產品合規承擔責任。這是市場准入的結構性要求，在中國沒有直接對應項。

source.publisher: Kuwait Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI — وزارة التجارة والصناعة); CITRA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kuwaiti company or 51% Kuwaiti-owned entity as authorized importer or distributor is mandatory for market entry. The commercial agency agreement must be registered with MOCI. The local importer is named on the CITRA type approval certificate. Direct import by a foreign manufacturer without a registered Kuwaiti local partner is not permitted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 作为授权进口商或经销商的科威特公司或51%科威特持股实体是市场准入的强制要求。商业代理协议须向MOCI注册。本地进口商在CITRA型号认证证书上署名。外国制造商在没有注册科威特本地合作伙伴的情况下直接进口是不被允许的。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 作為授權進口商或經銷商的科威特公司或51%科威特持股實體是市場准入的強制要求。商業代理協議須向MOCI登記。本地進口商在CITRA型號認證證書上署名。外國製造商在沒有登記科威特本地合作夥伴的情況下直接進口是不被允許的。
